decisions.title_en: SpaceX leases Colossus 1 data center to Anthropic for $1.25B/month after Grok latency issues
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Distinct from prior 'google-spacex-compute-deal' (that was Google renting GPUs from SpaceX). New facts: SpaceX rented full Colossus 1 (Memphis) capacity to rival Anthropic at $1.25B/month on a 180-day lease after its own Grok teams hit latency/aging-network/mixed-GPU issues.

decisions.title_en: Altman, Hassabis, Amodei and other AI leaders to attend G7 summit in Evian June 15-17
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. First G7 with all three frontier-lab CEOs plus Mistral, Cohere, Meta, Salesforce, Sakana etc.; Macron personally invited Altman; AI infrastructure & regulation on the agenda.

decisions.title_en: KPMG pulls flagship agentic-AI report riddled with AI hallucinations; only 5 of 45 citations correct
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. GPTZero (verified by FT) found 40 of 45 citations fabricated/mangled; false claims about UBS, NHS, TfL; follows EY's similar retraction last month.

decisions.title_en: Moonshot AI (Kimi) seeks $2B at $30B valuation, 7x in six months
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. event_date 2026-06-08 is 5 days old (within 5-day limit). Third raise in six months; valuation up ~7x from $4.3B in Dec 2025; ARR topped $200M in April.

decisions.title_en: Meta to cap employee AI token usage as internal spend hits billions; killed 'Claudeonomics' leaderboard
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Meta building internal platform to budget/limit employee token use weeks after pushing adoption; 60T tokens burned in 30 days; gaming of the now-shut leaderboard.

decisions.title_en: States diverge on AI: NY sends 7 AI bills to Hochul, RI bans therapy chatbots, Colorado vetoes algorithmic-pricing ban
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Amid federal preemption fights, states moved opposite directions in one week.

decisions.title_en: SpaceX eligible for early MSCI large-cap index inclusion starting June 13
decisions.reason: spacex-xai-ipo published 06-12 and 06-04 covering pricing and Nasdaq debut. Index-inclusion timeline is a minor mechanical follow-up, no substantive new development.
Released at Google I/O 2026 on 2026-05-20, 24 days old (>5 day limit).

decisions.title_en: NVIDIA deepens Hyundai robotics and SK hynix memory partnerships
decisions.reason: Already published 06-08 under nvidia-south-korea-ai-deals; same Korea partnership set, no new development.

decisions.title_en: NVIDIA Blackwell tops new AgentPerf agentic benchmark
decisions.reason: Vendor-run benchmark touting own hardware; low signal, not independently notable enough to publish.

decisions.title_en: Ex-DOGE staffers raise $130M for AI government-security startup
decisions.reason: Sources conflict materially: one frames it as a $130M a16z/Sequoia round for 'government systems security', another as 'Special', a firm buying companies to cut waste with AI backed by a16z/Steve Davis. Facts not verifiable to a confident, single account; dropped to avoid publishing inaccuracies.

decisions.title_en: Meta Applied AI team describes 'soul-crushing' menial work
decisions.reason: Morale/turnover angle folded into kept meta-ai-cost-controls item as context; exact Wired claims not independently confirmable, so not stood up as its own item.
